quality_assessment: Good test quality with minor to medium improvements recommended

all_violations.description: Conditional test skip based on runtime element visibility check
all_violations.suggestion: Seed the database with required test data using factories before running the test, or mock the response so that the element is guaranteed to be visible.

all_violations.description: Conditional test skip based on seeded data availability check
all_violations.suggestion: Use API or direct database seeding in a beforeEach hook to ensure at least one report exists, removing the need for runtime conditional skipping.

all_violations.description: Conditional test skip based on seeded client data availability check
all_violations.suggestion: Seed the test client dynamically inside the test suite setup to guarantee it exists rather than checking and skipping at runtime.

all_violations.description: Tests rely on global seeded state without explicit test-level data provisioning or dynamic data creation
all_violations.suggestion: Implement test-specific database seeding (e.g. creating client and report records inside beforeEach or custom page fixtures) and perform cleanup after execution.

all_violations.description: Hardcoded routing strings used directly in test navigation
all_violations.suggestion: Move routes/URLs into a unified config file or route enum to prevent failures when pages are moved.

all_violations.description: Test titles do not strictly follow Given-When-Then BDD naming convention
all_violations.suggestion: Prefix titles with 'Given... When... Then...' to align with the BDD Format best practices.
all_violations.code_snippet: test('[8.1-E2E-001] reports list page loads with heading and generate button', async ({ ownerPage }) => {

all_violations.description: Redundant navigation in beforeEach block. In 6 out of 9 tests, ownerPage navigates to '/reports' in the beforeEach block, only to immediately navigate to another page (e.g. '/reports/templates', '/reports/agent-log', '/analytics', etc.) at the start of the test.
all_violations.suggestion: Move route-specific navigations out of beforeEach and place them inside only the individual tests that require them, or group tests in nested describe blocks with separate beforeEach setups.

all_violations.description: The describe block does not configure explicit parallel execution within the file
all_violations.suggestion: Enable parallel E2E execution inside the test file using 'test.describe.configure({ mode: 'parallel' })' to fully leverage Playwright's parallel runner.

top_10_recommendations.recommendation: Refactor E2E navigation: Avoid global '/reports' navigation in beforeEach for tests that immediately navigate elsewhere.
Remove runtime conditional blocks and test.skip() statements; guarantee seed data exists via fixtures.
Implement isolated API-first seeding per test utilizing data factories.
Add 'test.describe.configure({ mode: 'parallel' })' at the top of the file to execute E2E tests concurrently.
Extract raw routes into a shared config/helper constants file.
Refactor E2E test titles to strictly adhere to Given-When-Then BDD standard.

performance_gain: Sequential analysis fallback used, local execution in ~1.2s
